fields.name: Description
fields.default: AI-native by architecture. Not a chatbot bolted on -- the same API developers use is the API AI uses.

default.title: Block generation
default.body: Screenshot or prompt in, working CMS block out. Layout, template, theme styles, and editing sidebar -- all generated in one step.

default.title: Page composition
default.body: AI composes full pages from your block library and writes fitting copy. Real pages from reusable components. The more blocks you build, the faster this gets.

default.title: API-driven workflows
default.body: The entire app is a REST API. Claude Code builds, iterates, and deploys programmatically. Scoped tokens keep it safe.
